ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock (e.g., StockA) */,
  "stock_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock category */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Unique stock ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is listed (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_stock_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_category_id") REFERENCES stock_categories ("stock_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "time_stamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp for the stock price record */,
  "stock_price" REAL /* Price of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Calculated moving average for the stock price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded at the given timestamp */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock at the given timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_categories" (
  "stock_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., small-cap) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "min_market_cap" REAL /* Minimum market capitalization for the category */,
  "max_market_cap" REAL /* Maximum market capitalization for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "alert_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the alert should be active (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of stocks traded */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction was made */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "last_sync_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data sync from the source */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data synchronization (e.g., real-time, daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price being updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the update was made */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the data update (e.g., success, failed, pending) */,
  "update_message" TEXT /* Message or error message related to the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES market_data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_stock_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("stock_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, system, transaction) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the notification (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for this session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_strength" REAL /* Strength or significance of the trend (e.g., 0.5, 0.8) */,
  "trend_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trend (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
